scene_title: Linha do tempo entre pergaminho e robo
narrative_beat: Conexao de fogo entre antigo e moderno

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid visual timeline composition with ancient gold ochre parchment scroll on left and crimson humanoid robot on right connected by golden flames and light in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden flame connection between the ancient scroll and the crimson robot
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern city bridge at monochrome dusk in background
props: ancient parchment scroll in gold ochre

composition.foreground: scroll and robot in vivid gold crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber-crimson saturation, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: two thousand years collapsed into one image

symbolism.primary: the prophecy and its fulfillment sharing the same frame
symbolism.secondary: golden flame as the unbroken thread of divine foreknowledge

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
